docs.title: PracLab
docs.text:
CS2（Counter-Strike 2）练习模式插件 / A CS2 practice-mode plugin

基于 CounterStrikeSharp 与 Metamod:Source，为竞技训练场景提供完整的道具/出生点/Bot/回放辅助命令。

Built on CounterStrikeSharp and Metamod:Source, providing a complete set of utility commands for grenade/spawn/bot/replay training scenarios.

语言 / Language 中文 English

docs.title: PracLab
docs.text:
A CS2 (Counter-Strike 2) practice-mode plugin built on CounterStrikeSharp and Metamod:Source, providing a complete set of utility commands for grenade/spawn/bot/replay training scenarios.

  • Target framework: .NET 10 + CounterStrikeSharp.API 1.0.371
  • Supported maps: Inferno, Mirage, Nuke, Ancient, Vertigo, Anubis, Dust II, Train, Cache

docs.title: Feature Overview
docs.text: Category Description Map management Quick switch between 9 active/reserve maps (.inferno, .mirage, etc.) Bots Spawn a bot at the player position (standing/crouching), auto-managed collision, crosshair-targeted kick Spawn points 9 teleport commands (same-team/CT/T × numbered/nearest/farthest) + box visualization + E-key aim teleport Grenade rethrow 7 commands to rethrow the last grenade of any type, plus return-to-throw-position Dryrun Temporarily switch from prac to competitive config for one round, auto-revert to prac when round ends Replay system Record player movement trajectories and play them back via bots; supports parallel playback, playback-by-Id, list management Localization Chinese (zh-CN, default) and English (en); all player-visible text is driven by localization files

docs.title: Architecture
docs.text:
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                CS2 Server (Source 2 engine)                  │
├────────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────┤
│  CounterStrikeSharp (CSS)  │     Metamod:Source             │
│  ────────────────────────  │     ──────────────────────     │
│  PracLab (C# / .NET 10)    │  PracLabReplayEngine (C++20)   │
│  - Command routing / gating │  - Hook ProcessMovement        │
│  - Config / i18n / JSON IO │  - Hook CCSBot::Update         │
│  - Spawns / Bots / Nade UI │  - Hook PlayerRunCommand       │
│  ─────────┬─────────────────│  - Frame-level move record/replay │
│           │  P/Invoke (PRL_* C ABI)                         │
│           └─────────────────────────────────────────────────►
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

Two-layer architecture:

  • L1 — PracLab CSSharp C#: player commands, chat UI, config loading, localization, JSON read/write for recording files.
  • L2 — PracLabReplayEngine C++ Metamod: hooks engine functions to implement frame-level movement recording and playback; exports the PRL_* C API for C# P/Invoke.

The cross-language ABI contract is documented in replay-engine/include/praclab_replay.h. When L 2 is not deployed: the main plugin still works; only .record/.replay family commands show a "replay engine not loaded" message to players.

docs.title: Project Structure
docs.text:
PracLab/
├── PracLab.cs                # Plugin main class (route table / gating / config loader / shared state)
├── PracLab.csproj            # .NET 10 project file
├── Commands/                 # Feature partial classes
│   ├── BotCommands.cs            # .bot / .crouchbot / .kick / .kickall
│   ├── BotCollisionHandler.cs    # Bot collision management + respawn teleport
│   ├── ClearCommands.cs          # .clear / .break
│   ├── ConVarCommands.cs         # .solid / .impacts / .traj
│   ├── DamageHandler.cs          # Real-time damage feedback
│   ├── DryRunCommands.cs         # .dryrun / .restartround
│   ├── EventHandlers.cs          # OnMapStart / OnEntitySpawned / EventPlayerBlind etc.
│   ├── GrenadeCommands.cs        # .rethrow* / .last
│   ├── GrenadeFunctions.cs       # Grenade spawn helpers
│   ├── HelpCommand.cs            # .help
│   ├── PracticeCommands.cs       # .prac / .map
│   ├── ReplayCommands.cs         # .record / .replay / .clearrecord* / .currentrecord
│   ├── SpawnCommands.cs          # .spawn family (9 commands)
│   ├── SpawnMarkerCommands.cs    # .showspawns / .hidespawns + E-key teleport
│   ├── TeamCommands.cs           # .watch / .fas
│   ├── TimeGodCommands.cs        # .fastforward / .noflash / .god
│   └── TimerCommand.cs           # .timer
├── cfg/PracLab/              # Server config files
│   ├── config.cfg                # Master toggle + default language
│   ├── prac.cfg                  # Practice-mode ConVars
│   └── dryrun.cfg                # Competitive-mode ConVars (used by .dryrun)
├── lang/                     # Localization
│   ├── zh-CN.json
│   └── en.json
├── replay-engine/            # L2 C++ Metamod plugin
│   ├── src/                      # record/playback/hook implementations
│   ├── include/praclab_replay.h  # Cross-language ABI header
│   ├── configs/                  # Metamod VDF + gamedata.json
│   ├── configure.ps1             # CMake configure script
│   ├── build.ps1                 # Build script
│   └── CMakeLists.txt
└── documentation/            # This site (MkDocs)
    ├── docs/
    └── mkdocs.yml

docs.title: Credits
docs.text:
This project drew inspiration from the following open-source projects during development:

  • CS2-Bot-Controller — Reference for the replay engine's bot control, CCSBot::Update hook, and PlayerRunCommand recording.
  • MatchZy — Reference for project structure, documentation organization, and CS2 plugin engineering practices.

docs.title: License
docs.text: See the repository root LICENSE.

docs.title: Chat Commands
docs.text:
PracLab intercepts global chat (say) and team chat (say_team) to recognize player commands. All commands support both of the following prefix forms, case-insensitive:

Prefix Example . .prac ! !prac

docs.title: Practice Mode Control
docs.text: Command Alias Description .prac — Load practice config and enable practice mode

docs.title: Map Management
docs.text: Command Alias Description .map — Show the list of available maps (visible to sender only) .inferno — Switch to de_inferno .mirage — Switch to de_mirage .nuke — Switch to de_nuke .ancient — Switch to de_ancient .vertigo — Switch to de_vertigo .anubis — Switch to de_anubis .dust2 — Switch to de_dust2 .train — Switch to de_train .cache — Switch to de_cache

docs.title: Bot Management
docs.text: Command Alias Description .bot — Spawn a bot at the player position .crouchbot .cbot Spawn a crouching bot at the player position .kickall — Remove all bots .kick — Remove the bot the player is aiming at

docs.title: Utility & Environment
docs.text: Command Alias Description .clear — Remove all grenades/projectiles .break .br Break all breakable entities

docs.title: Time & God Mode
docs.text: Command Alias Description .fastforward .ff Start 10× server time fast-forward for 20 seconds, then auto-revert .noflash — Toggle flashbang immunity for the player (event-driven, other players unaffected) .god — Toggle god mode for the player

docs.title: Spawn Point Teleport
docs.text: Command Alias Description .spawn <N> .s Teleport to the N-th spawn of the same team (default N=1) .ctspawn <N> .cts Teleport to the N-th CT spawn .tspawn <N> .ts Teleport to the N-th T spawn .bestspawn .bs Teleport to the nearest own-team spawn .worstspawn .ws Teleport to the farthest own-team spawn .bestctspawn .bcts Teleport to the nearest CT spawn .worstctspawn .wcts Teleport to the farthest CT spawn .besttspawn .bts Teleport to the nearest T spawn .worsttspawn .wts Teleport to the farthest T spawn

docs.title: Spawn Point Boxes
docs.text:
Command Alias Description .showspawns — Re-display both teams' spawn boxes (auto-shown when prac mode is enabled) .hidespawns — Hide spawn boxes

E-key teleport: Aim at a box and press the use key (default E) to teleport to that spawn; the chat shows "Teleported to spawn N". CT and T boxes are both green; the box center shows an index number (rotated per-map config). In prac mode there is no team restriction — players may aim at any box to teleport. Boxes only show competitive-mode spawns (consistent with the .spawn family commands).

docs.title: Team Switching
docs.text: Command Alias Description .watch .fas Force all other players into spectator mode, leaving only the command issuer active

docs.title: Grenade Rethrow & Position Recall
docs.text: Command Alias Description .rethrow .rt Rethrow the player's last thrown grenade .rethrowsmoke .rethrows Rethrow only the last smoke grenade .rethrownade .rethrown Rethrow only the last HE grenade .rethrowflash .rethrowf Rethrow only the last flashbang .rethrowmolotov .rethrowm Rethrow only the last molotov/incgrenade .rethrowdecoy .rethrowd Rethrow only the last decoy .last .ls Teleport back to the last grenade position

docs.title: Dryrun & Round Control
docs.text:
Command Alias Description .dryrun .dry Temporarily switch from prac to competitive config for one round; auto-revert to prac when the round ends .restartround .rr Restart the current round (executes mp_restartgame)

Dryrun flow: kick all bots → disable prac-specific ConVars (sv_cheats, traj, infinite_ammo, etc.) → load dryrun.cfg competitive config → restart the round to begin; when the round ends (EventRoundEnd), prac config is automatically restored. Use this to play a real competitive round from within a practice session.

docs.title: Replay System
docs.text:
Command Alias Description .record — Enter pending-record state; starts recording when the player moves or presses F (inspect key); press F again or use .stoprecord to stop and save .stoprecord — Stop recording and save (equivalent to pressing F) .replay [Id] — No argument: play back all stopped recordings in parallel; with Id: play back only that recording. A bot of the same team is auto-spawned as the playback carrier .stopreplay — Stop all ongoing playbacks and kick the corresponding bots .clearrecord <Id> — Delete the recording with the given Id (removes both JSON file and list entry) .clearrecordall — Clear all recordings .currentrecord .currentrec Print the recording list table (ID / Name / Status / Bot) to the server console

Two-layer architecture: The replay system consists of two parts — - Layer 1 (CSSharp C#): command dispatch, UI prompts, JSON read/write for recording files (under cfg/PracLab/recordings/). - Layer 2 (C++ Metamod plugin PracLabReplayEngine): hooks engine functions (ProcessMovement, CCSBot::Update, PlayerRunCommand, etc.) to implement frame-level movement recording and playback.

The cross-language ABI contract is documented in replay-engine/include/praclab_replay.h. Any change to field order/type must be synchronized across both layers.

When the replay engine is not deployed: all .record/.replay/... commands show a "replay engine not loaded, replay unavailable" message to the player, but other plugin features are unaffected.

docs.title: Timer
docs.text: Command Alias Description .timer — Start timing; entering .timer again stops it and prints the elapsed time to the player

docs.title: ConVar Toggles
docs.text: Command Alias Description .solid — Toggle mp_solid_teammates (teammate collision) .impacts — Toggle sv_showimpacts (show bullet impact markers) .traj — Toggle sv_grenade_trajectory_prac_pipreview (show grenade trajectory)

docs.title: Help
docs.text: Command Alias Description .help — Display all available commands grouped by category in chat (visible to sender only)

docs.title: Configuration
docs.text: PracLab's config files all live under the server's <CS2>/csgo/cfg/PracLab/ directory. The repository's cfg/PracLab/ provides default templates. After editing, restart the plugin or the server for changes to take effect.

docs.title: 1. config.cfg — Master Toggle
docs.text:
Path: <CS2>/csgo/cfg/PracLab/config.cfg Format: One ConVar per line; key value separated by a space; // starts a comment.

ConVar Type Default Description praclab_enabled bool true Master toggle. When false, no command (including .prac, .map, map switches) responds; the sender sees "practice mode is not enabled". praclab_default_language string zh-CN Server default language code. Options: zh-CN / en.

docs.title: 2. Recordings Directory
docs.text:
Path: <CS2>/csgo/cfg/PracLab/recordings/

JSON recording files saved by .record are stored here, with the filename pattern <Id>_<PlayerName>.json. .clearrecord <Id> and .clearrecordall delete both the file and the in-memory entry.

Auto-created: The plugin's Load calls EnsureRecordingsDir() to ensure the directory exists; no manual setup is required.

Cleared on map change: The OnMapStart listener clears the in-memory recording list (_recordings.Clear()), but does not delete the JSON files. To preserve recordings across maps, record the Ids via .currentrecord before switching maps.

docs.title: 3. Spawn Box Per-Map Configuration
docs.text:
Each map's box Z offset and index-text yaw rotation is hardcoded in Commands/SpawnMarkerCommands.cs:

  • SpawnTextYawByMap: yaw rotation (degrees) of the index text per map per team
  • SpawnExtraZOffsetByMap: additional Z raise for the box/text per map

Current configuration:

Map T yaw CT yaw Extra Z offset de_cache 90 180 0 de_train -90 0 0 de_anubis 0 180 0 de_vertigo 90 180 0 de_ancient 0 180 16 de_nuke -90 90 0 de_mirage 90 -90 0 de_inferno -90 90 0

Unconfigured maps default to yaw=0 and Z offset=0. When adding support for a new map, extend these tables and rebuild.

docs.title: Developers
docs.text: This page describes how to build both layers of PracLab from source, along with project structure notes. For deploying build artifacts, see Installation.

docs.title: 1.1 L1 (C# plugin)
docs.text: Dependency Version Notes .NET SDK 10.0+ To build Layer 1 CounterStrikeSharp.API 1.0.371+ Auto-restored via NuGet

docs.title: 1.2 L2 (C++ Metamod plugin)
docs.text: Dependency Version Notes Visual Studio 2022+ MSVC 14.51+ Windows build CMake 3.20+ Build system Ninja Any CMake generator HL2SDK CS2 Match the server Environment variable HL2SDKCS2 Metamod:Source source Match the server Environment variable MMSOURCE_DEV protoc 3.21.x Environment variable PROTOC funchook v1.1.3 CMake FetchContent (or local source) nlohmann/json v3.11.3 CMake FetchContent (or local source)

docs.title: 2. Build L1 (PracLab C# plugin)
docs.text:
# Run from the repository root
dotnet build PracLab.csproj -c Release

Build output path:

bin/Release/net10.0/
├── PracLab.dll                # Main assembly
└── lang/
    ├── zh-CN.json             # Chinese localization (auto-copied at build time)
    └── en.json                # English localization

docs.title: 3.1 Prepare the SDKs
docs.text:
Extract HL2SDK CS2, Metamod source, and protoc to d:\PracLab\deps\:

deps/
├── hl2sdk-cs2/
├── metamod-source/
├── protoc-3.21.8/
│   └── bin/protoc.exe
├── funchook/                 # funchook source (optional; otherwise fetched online)
└── nlohmann_json/            # nlohmann/json source (optional; otherwise fetched online)

docs.title: 3.2 Configure CMake
docs.text:
cd d:\PracLab\replay-engine
.\configure.ps1

configure.ps1 sets up the MSVC environment variables, cleans the old cache, and generates a Release build directory with the Ninja generator. The script hardcodes MSVC and Windows SDK paths — adjust them if your environment differs.

docs.title: 3.3 Build
docs.text:
.\build.ps1

On success, the output is:

=== SUCCESS ===
DLL: d:\PracLab\replay-engine\out\build\x64-Release\package\addons\PracLabReplayEngine\bin\win64\PracLabReplayEngine.dll
Size: XXX.XX KB

docs.title: 3.4 Key Build Constraints
docs.text:
The following constraints stem from engine behavior and project conventions:

  • protoc version: Is 3.21.x; CMakeLists.txt enforces this.
  • Static runtime: Windows uses /MT (statically linked CRT) so the plugin can be deployed standalone.
  • protoc-generated code: The final keyword in .pb.h classes is automatically stripped to allow PlayerCommand to inherit CSGOUserCmdPB.
  • gamedata.json: Contains engine function signatures; may need rescanning after a CS2 update. See replay-engine/configs/addons/PracLabReplayEngine/gamedata.json.

docs.title: 4. Project Structure
docs.text:
PracLab/
├── PracLab.cs                # Plugin main class (route table / gating / config loader / shared state)
├── PracLab.csproj            # .NET 10 project file
├── Commands/                 # Feature partial classes
│   ├── BotCommands.cs            # .bot / .crouchbot / .kick / .kickall
│   ├── BotCollisionHandler.cs    # Bot collision management + respawn teleport
│   ├── ClearCommands.cs          # .clear / .break
│   ├── ConVarCommands.cs         # .solid / .impacts / .traj
│   ├── DamageHandler.cs          # Real-time damage feedback
│   ├── DryRunCommands.cs         # .dryrun / .restartround
│   ├── EventHandlers.cs          # OnMapStart / OnEntitySpawned / EventPlayerBlind etc.
│   ├── GrenadeCommands.cs        # .rethrow* / .last
│   ├── GrenadeFunctions.cs       # Grenade spawn helpers
│   ├── HelpCommand.cs            # .help
│   ├── PracticeCommands.cs       # .prac / .map
│   ├── ReplayCommands.cs         # .record / .replay / .clearrecord* / .currentrecord
│   ├── SpawnCommands.cs          # .spawn family (9 commands)
│   ├── SpawnMarkerCommands.cs    # .showspawns / .hidespawns + E-key teleport
│   ├── TeamCommands.cs           # .watch / .fas
│   ├── TimeGodCommands.cs        # .fastforward / .noflash / .god
│   └── TimerCommand.cs           # .timer
├── cfg/PracLab/              # Server config files
│   ├── config.cfg                # Master toggle + default language
│   ├── prac.cfg                  # Practice-mode ConVars
│   └── dryrun.cfg                # Competitive-mode ConVars
├── lang/                     # Localization
│   ├── zh-CN.json
│   └── en.json
├── replay-engine/            # Layer 2 C++ Metamod plugin
│   ├── src/                      # record/playback/hook implementations
│   ├── include/praclab_replay.h  # Cross-language ABI header
│   ├── configs/                  # Metamod VDF + gamedata.json
│   ├── configure.ps1             # CMake configure script
│   ├── build.ps1                 # Build script
│   └── CMakeLists.txt
└── documentation/            # This site (MkDocs)
    ├── docs/
    └── mkdocs.yml

docs.title: 5. Cross-Language ABI Contract
docs.text:
Layer 1 (C#) and Layer 2 (C++) communicate via P/Invoke calls to the PRL_* family of C functions. The header lives at replay-engine/include/praclab_replay.h.

When modifying the ABI, both layers must be updated in sync:

Change type Layer 1 (C#) Layer 2 (C++) Add/modify struct field [StructLayout] class in Commands/ReplayCommands.cs include/praclab_replay.h + src/exports.cpp Add exported function [DllImport] declaration in Commands/ReplayCommands.cs Declaration in include/praclab_replay.h + implementation in src/exports.cpp Reorder fields Must sync Must sync (affects memory layout)

docs.title: 6. Localization File Maintenance
docs.text:
All player-facing text must be loaded from lang/*.json:

  • lang/zh-CN.json — Chinese (default language)
  • lang/en.json — English

docs.title: Installation
docs.text:
PracLab consists of two independent layers that can be deployed on demand:

  • Layer 1 (required): PracLab.dll — the CounterStrikeSharp C# plugin that provides all commands and UI.
  • Layer 2 (optional): PracLabReplayEngine.dll/.so — the Metamod C++ plugin that provides frame-level movement recording/playback. When not deployed, only the .record/.replay family commands are unavailable; other features are unaffected.

Build artifacts can be downloaded from the Release page, or compiled from source — see the Developers guide.

docs.title: 1. Prerequisites
docs.text: Dependency Version CS2 server Latest CounterStrikeSharp 1.0.371+ Metamod:Source Latest stable

docs.title: 2. Deploy Layer 1 to the CS2 server
docs.text: Assume the CS2 server root directory is <CS2> (the directory that contains csgo/):

docs.title: 2.1 Copy plugin files
docs.text:
<CS2>/csgo/addons/counterstrikesharp/plugins/PracLab/
├── PracLab.dll
└── lang/
    ├── zh-CN.json
    └── en.json

docs.title: 2.2 Copy config files
docs.text:
<CS2>/csgo/cfg/PracLab/
├── config.cfg                 # Master toggle + default language
├── prac.cfg                   # Practice-mode ConVars
└── dryrun.cfg                 # Competitive-mode ConVars (used by .dryrun)

The repository's cfg/PracLab/ directory already contains default configs — simply copy the whole directory.

docs.title: 2.3 Start the server
docs.text:
On startup, the console should show:

[PracLab] Load: executing...
[PracLab] HH:mm:ss Core default language: zh-CN, plugin enabled: True (hotReload: False)
[PracLab] HH:mm:ss Core registered 9 map change commands, route table has XX keys

Players can type .prac in chat to enable practice mode.

docs.title: 3. Deploy Layer 2 to the CS2 server
3.1 Copy the shared library
docs.text:
Windows:

<CS2>/csgo/addons/PracLabReplayEngine/bin/win64/PracLabReplayEngine.dll

Linux:

<CS2>/csgo/addons/PracLabReplayEngine/bin/linuxsteamrt64/PracLabReplayEngine.so

docs.title: 3.2 Copy the Metamod VDF and gamedata
docs.text:
The repository's replay-engine/configs/ directory provides ready-made files:

<CS2>/csgo/addons/metamod/PracLabReplayEngine.vdf         # Windows
<CS2>/csgo/addons/metamod/PracLabReplayEngine.linux.vdf   # Linux (rename to .vdf)
<CS2>/csgo/addons/PracLabReplayEngine/gamedata.json       # Signature scan config

docs.title: 3.3 Verify
docs.text:
Start the server; the console should show:

[PracLab] HH:mm:ss Replay engine detected: PracLabReplayEngine loaded

Or run .currentrecord in the PracLab console — if it says "replay engine not loaded", Layer 2 is not properly deployed.

docs.title: 4. Upgrade & Rollback
docs.text: Operation Steps Upgrade Layer 1 Overwrite PracLab.dll and lang/*.json etc. Upgrade Layer 2 Stop the server → overwrite PracLabReplayEngine.dll/.so → start the server (Metamod plugins do not support hot reload) Rollback Replace with the older files; config files are backward compatible

docs.title: PracLab
docs.text:
CS2（Counter-Strike 2）练习模式插件，基于 CounterStrikeSharp 与 Metamod:Source，为竞技训练场景提供完整的道具/出生点/Bot/回放辅助命令。

  • 目标框架：.NET 10 + CounterStrikeSharp.API 1.0.371
  • 支持地图：Inferno、Mirage、Nuke、Ancient、Vertigo、Anubis、Dust II、Train、Cache

docs.title: 功能概览
docs.text: 分类 说明 地图管理 9 张现役/备用地图快速切换（.inferno、.mirage 等） 机器人 在玩家位置生成 Bot（站/蹲），自动管理碰撞，准星指向踢出 出生点 9 条传送命令（同队/CT/T × 编号/最近/最远）+ 方框可视化 + E 键瞄准传送 道具重投 7 条命令重投任意类型的最后投掷物，并支持回到投掷位置 Dryrun 从 prac 临时切换到竞技配置打一个回合，结束自动回到 prac 回放系统 录制玩家移动轨迹并由 Bot 复现，支持并行回放、按 Id 回放、列表管理 多语言 中文（zh-CN，默认）与英文（en），所有玩家可见文本走本地化文件

docs.title: 架构
docs.text:
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                CS2 Server (Source 2 engine)                  │
├────────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────┤
│  CounterStrikeSharp (CSS)  │     Metamod:Source             │
│  ────────────────────────  │     ──────────────────────     │
│  PracLab (C# / .NET 10)    │  PracLabReplayEngine (C++20)   │
│  - 命令路由 / 门控          │  - Hook ProcessMovement        │
│  - 配置 / 本地化 / JSON IO  │  - Hook CCSBot::Update         │
│  - 出生点 / Bot / 道具 UI   │  - Hook PlayerRunCommand       │
│  ─────────┬─────────────────│  - 帧级移动录制与回放           │
│           │  P/Invoke (PRL_* C ABI)                         │
│           └─────────────────────────────────────────────────►
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘

两层架构：

  • L1 — PracLab CSSharp C#：玩家命令、聊天 UI、配置加载、本地化、录制文件 JSON 读写。
  • L2 — PracLabReplayEngine C++ Metamod：通过 Hook 引擎函数实现帧级移动录制与回放，导出 PRL_* C API 供 C# P/Invoke 调用。

跨语言 ABI 契约见 replay-engine/include/praclab_replay.h。未部署 L2 时：插件主体功能仍可用，仅 .record/.replay 系列命令向玩家提示「回放引擎未加载」。

docs.title: 项目结构
docs.text:
PracLab/
├── PracLab.cs                # 插件主类（路由表/门控/配置加载/共享数据）
├── PracLab.csproj            # .NET 10 项目文件
├── Commands/                 # 各功能 partial 类
│   ├── BotCommands.cs            # .bot / .crouchbot / .kick / .kickall
│   ├── BotCollisionHandler.cs    # Bot 碰撞管理 + 重生传送
│   ├── ClearCommands.cs          # .clear / .break
│   ├── ConVarCommands.cs         # .solid / .impacts / .traj
│   ├── DamageHandler.cs          # 实时伤害提示
│   ├── DryRunCommands.cs         # .dryrun / .restartround
│   ├── EventHandlers.cs          # OnMapStart / OnEntitySpawned / EventPlayerBlind 等
│   ├── GrenadeCommands.cs        # .rethrow* / .last
│   ├── GrenadeFunctions.cs       # 投掷物生成辅助
│   ├── HelpCommand.cs            # .help
│   ├── PracticeCommands.cs       # .prac / .map
│   ├── ReplayCommands.cs         # .record / .replay / .clearrecord* / .currentrecord
│   ├── SpawnCommands.cs          # .spawn 系列 9 条
│   ├── SpawnMarkerCommands.cs    # .showspawns / .hidespawns + E 键传送
│   ├── TeamCommands.cs           # .watch / .fas
│   ├── TimeGodCommands.cs        # .fastforward / .noflash / .god
│   └── TimerCommand.cs           # .timer
├── cfg/PracLab/              # 服务器配置文件
│   ├── config.cfg                # 插件总开关 + 默认语言
│   ├── prac.cfg                  # 练习模式 ConVar
│   └── dryrun.cfg                # 竞技模式 ConVar
├── lang/                     # 本地化
│   ├── zh-CN.json
│   └── en.json
├── replay-engine/            # L2 C++ Metamod 插件
│   ├── src/                      # 录制/回放/hook 实现
│   ├── include/praclab_replay.h  # 跨语言 ABI 头文件
│   ├── configs/                  # Metamod VDF + gamedata.json
│   ├── configure.ps1             # CMake 配置脚本
│   ├── build.ps1                 # 编译脚本
│   └── CMakeLists.txt
└── documentation/            # 本文档（MkDocs）
    ├── docs/
    └── mkdocs.yml

docs.title: 致谢
docs.text:
本项目在开发过程中参考了以下开源项目：

  • CS2-Bot-Controller — 回放引擎的 Bot 控制、CCSBot::Update Hook、PlayerRunCommand 录制等核心思路参考。
  • MatchZy — 项目结构、文档组织与 CS2 插件工程实践的参考。

docs.title: 许可证
docs.text: 参见仓库根目录 LICENSE。

docs.title: 聊天栏命令
docs.text:
PracLab 通过拦截全局聊天（say）与队伍聊天（say_team）来识别玩家指令。所有命令均支持以下两种前缀形式，大小写不敏感：

前缀 示例 . .prac ! !prac

docs.title: Practice 模式控制
docs.text: 命令 别名 功能 .prac — 加载练习配置，开启 practice 模式

docs.title: 地图管理
docs.text: 命令 别名 功能 .map — 显示可用地图列表（仅发送者可见） .inferno — 切换到「炼狱小镇」（de_inferno） .mirage — 切换到「荒漠迷城」（de_mirage） .nuke — 切换到「核子危机」（de_nuke） .ancient — 切换到「远古遗迹」（de_ancient） .vertigo — 切换到「殒命大厦」（de_vertigo） .anubis — 切换到「阿努比斯」（de_anubis） .dust2 — 切换到「炙热沙城2」（de_dust2） .train — 切换到「列车停放站」（de_train） .cache — 切换到「死城之谜」（de_cache）

docs.title: 机器人管理
docs.text: 命令 别名 功能 .bot — 在玩家位置生成一个 bot .crouchbot .cbot 在玩家位置生成一个蹲着的 bot .kickall — 移除所有 bot .kick — 移除准星指向的 bot

docs.title: 道具与环境
docs.text: 命令 别名 功能 .clear — 清除所有的道具 .break .br 破坏所有可破坏实体

docs.title: 时间与无敌
docs.text: 命令 别名 功能 .fastforward .ff 启动 10 倍速服务器时间倍速，持续 20 秒后自动还原 .noflash — 切换该玩家的闪光弹免疫（事件驱动，其他玩家不受影响） .god — 切换该玩家无敌模式

docs.title: 出生点传送
docs.text: 命令 别名 功能 .spawn <N> .s 传送到同队第 N 个出生点（缺省 N=1） .ctspawn <N> .cts 传送到 CT 方第 N 个出生点 .tspawn <N> .ts 传送到 T 方第 N 个出生点 .bestspawn .bs 传送到最近的己方出生点 .worstspawn .ws 传送到最远的己方出生点 .bestctspawn .bcts 传送到最近的 CT 方出生点 .worstctspawn .wcts 传送到最远的 CT 方出生点 .besttspawn .bts 传送到最近的 T 方出生点 .worsttspawn .wts 传送到最远的 T 方出生点

docs.title: 出生点方框
docs.text:
命令 别名 功能 .showspawns — 重新显示双方出生点方框（prac 模式开启时自动显示） .hidespawns — 隐藏出生点方框

E 键传送：对准方框按下使用键（默认 E）即可传送到该出生点，聊天栏提示「已传送到第 N 个出生点」。CT 和 T 方框均为绿色，方框中心显示序号（按地图配置旋转）。prac 模式下不限制队伍，玩家可瞄准任一方框传送。方框仅显示竞技模式出生点（与 .spawn 系列命令一致）。

docs.title: 队伍切换
docs.text: 命令 别名 功能 .watch .fas 强制所有其他玩家进入观察者模式，仅保留命令使用者活动

docs.title: 道具重投与位置回溯
docs.text: 命令 别名 功能 .rethrow .rt 重新投掷玩家最后投掷的道具 .rethrowsmoke .rethrows 仅重投最后投掷的烟雾弹 .rethrownade .rethrown 仅重投最后投掷的手雷 .rethrowflash .rethrowf 仅重投最后投掷的闪光弹 .rethrowmolotov .rethrowm 仅重投最后投掷的燃烧瓶 .rethrowdecoy .rethrowd 仅重投最后投掷的诱饵弹 .last .ls 传送回最后投掷道具的位置

docs.title: Dryrun 与回合控制
docs.text:
命令 别名 功能 .dryrun .dry 从 prac 模式临时切换到竞技配置打一个回合，回合结束自动回到 prac 模式 .restartround .rr 重新开始当前回合（执行 mp_restartgame）

Dryrun 流程：踢出所有 bot → 关闭 prac 特有 ConVar（sv_cheats、traj、infinite_ammo 等）→ 加载 dryrun.cfg 竞技配置 → 重启回合开始；回合结束（EventRoundEnd）自动恢复 prac 配置。用于在练习中快速打一个真竞技回合。

docs.title: 回放系统
docs.text:
命令 别名 功能 .record — 进入待录制状态，玩家移动或按 F 键（检视键）开始录制，再次按 F 或 .stoprecord 停止并保存 .stoprecord — 停止录制并保存（与按 F 键等效） .replay [Id] — 无参数：并行回放所有已停止的录制；指定 Id：仅回放该录制。自动创建同队 Bot 作为回放载体 .stopreplay — 停止所有正在进行的回放并踢出对应 Bot .clearrecord <Id> — 删除指定 Id 的录制（同时删除 JSON 文件与列表条目） .clearrecordall — 清除所有录制 .currentrecord .currentrec 在服务器控制台输出录制列表表格（ID / 名称 / 状态 / Bot）

二层架构：回放系统由两部分组成——

  • Layer 1（CSSharp C#）：命令分发、UI 提示、录制文件 JSON 读写（cfg/PracLab/recordings/）。
  • Layer 2（C++ Metamod 插件 PracLabReplayEngine）：通过 Hook ProcessMovement、CCSBot::Update、PlayerRunCommand 等引擎函数实现帧级移动录制与回放。

跨语言 ABI 契约见 replay-engine/include/praclab_replay.h，修改字段顺序/类型须同步更新两层代码。

回放引擎未部署时：所有 .record/.replay/... 命令会向玩家提示「回放引擎未加载，回放功能不可用」，但插件其他功能不受影响。

docs.title: 计时器
docs.text: 命令 别名 功能 .timer — 开始计时；再次输入 .timer 时停止并向玩家打印耗时

docs.title: ConVar 切换
docs.text: 命令 别名 功能 .solid — 切换 mp_solid_teammates（队友碰撞） .impacts — 切换 sv_showimpacts（显示子弹命中点） .traj — 切换 sv_grenade_trajectory_prac_pipreview（显示投掷物轨迹）

docs.title: 帮助
docs.text: 命令 别名 功能 .help — 在聊天栏分类显示所有可用指令（仅发送者可见）

docs.title: 安装部署
docs.text:
PracLab 由两层独立组件构成，可按需部署：

  • L1（必需）：PracLab.dll — CounterStrikeSharp C# 插件，提供全部命令与 UI。
  • L2（可选）：PracLabReplayEngine.dll/.so — Metamod C++ 插件，提供帧级移动录制/回放。未部署时仅 .record/.replay 系列命令不可用，其他功能不受影响。

构建产物可从 Release 下载，或参考开发者文档自行编译。

docs.title: 1. 前置依赖
docs.text: 依赖 版本 说明 CS2 服务器 最新版 专用服务器 CounterStrikeSharp 1.0.371+ CS2 脚本框架，须先部署到服务器 Metamod:Source 最新稳定版 Layer 2 依赖（仅在部署回放引擎时需要）

docs.title: 2. 部署 L1 到 CS2 服务器
docs.text: 假设 CS2 服务器根目录为 <CS2>（即包含 csgo/ 的目录）：

docs.title: 2.1 复制插件文件
docs.text:
<CS2>/csgo/addons/counterstrikesharp/plugins/PracLab/
├── PracLab.dll
└── lang/
    ├── zh-CN.json
    └── en.json

docs.title: 2.2 复制配置文件
docs.text:
<CS2>/csgo/cfg/PracLab/
├── config.cfg                 # 插件配置
├── prac.cfg                   # 练习模式配置
└── dryrun.cfg                 # 竞技模式配置

仓库内 cfg/PracLab/ 目录已提供默认配置，直接整体复制即可。

docs.title: 2.3 启动服务器
docs.text:
启动后在控制台应看到：

[PracLab] Load: executing...
[PracLab] HH:mm:ss Core default language: zh-CN, plugin enabled: True (hotReload: False)
[PracLab] HH:mm:ss Core registered 9 map change commands, route table has XX keys

玩家在聊天栏输入 .prac 即可开启练习模式。

docs.title: 3. 部署 L2 到 CS2 服务器
3.1 复制动态库
docs.text:
Windows：

<CS2>/csgo/addons/PracLabReplayEngine/bin/win64/PracLabReplayEngine.dll

Linux：

<CS2>/csgo/addons/PracLabReplayEngine/bin/linuxsteamrt64/PracLabReplayEngine.so

docs.title: 3.2 复制 Metamod VDF 与 gamedata
docs.text:
仓库 replay-engine/configs/ 目录提供现成文件：

<CS2>/csgo/addons/metamod/PracLabReplayEngine.vdf         # Windows
<CS2>/csgo/addons/metamod/PracLabReplayEngine.linux.vdf   # Linux（重命名为 .vdf）
<CS2>/csgo/addons/PracLabReplayEngine/gamedata.json       # 签名扫描配置

docs.title: 3.3 验证
docs.text:
启动服务器，控制台应出现：

[PracLab] HH:mm:ss Replay engine detected: PracLabReplayEngine loaded

或在 PracLab 控制台执行 .currentrecord，若提示「回放引擎未加载」则说明 Layer 2 未正确部署。

docs.title: 4. 升级与回滚
docs.text: 操作 步骤 升级 L1 覆盖 PracLab.dll 与 lang/*.json 等文件 升级 L2 停止服务器 → 覆盖 PracLabReplayEngine.dll/.so → 启动服务器（Metamod 插件不支持热重载） 回滚 替换为旧版本文件即可，配置文件向后兼容

docs.title: 开发者
docs.text: 本页介绍如何从源码构建 PracLab 的两层组件，以及项目结构说明。部署产物请参考安装部署。

docs.title: 1.1 L1（C# 插件）
docs.text: 依赖 版本 说明 .NET SDK 10.0+ 编译 L1 CounterStrikeSharp.API 1.0.371+ NuGet 自动还原

docs.title: 1.2 L2（C++ Metamod 插件）
docs.text: 依赖 版本 说明 Visual Studio 2022+ MSVC 14.51+ Windows 编译 CMake 3.20+ 构建系统 Ninja 任意 CMake 生成器 HL2SDK CS2 与服务器匹配 环境变量 HL2SDKCS2 Metamod:Source 源码 与服务器匹配 环境变量 MMSOURCE_DEV protoc 3.21.x 环境变量 PROTOC funchook v1.1.3 CMake FetchContent 自动拉取（或本地源码） nlohmann/json v3.11.3 CMake FetchContent 自动拉取（或本地源码）

docs.title: 2. 构建 L1（PracLab C# 插件）
docs.text:
# 在仓库根目录执行
dotnet build PracLab.csproj -c Release

产物路径：

bin/Release/net10.0/
├── PracLab.dll                # 主程序集
└── lang/
    ├── zh-CN.json             # 中文本地化（构建时自动复制）
    └── en.json                # 英文本地化

docs.title: 3. 构建 L2（PracLabReplayEngine C++ 插件）
3.1 准备 SDK
docs.text:
将 HL2SDK CS2、Metamod 源码、protoc 解压到 d:\PracLab\deps\：

deps/
├── hl2sdk-cs2/
├── metamod-source/
├── protoc-3.21.8/
│   └── bin/protoc.exe
├── funchook/                 # funchook 源码（可选，否则 CMake 在线拉取）
└── nlohmann_json/            # nlohmann/json 源码（可选，否则 CMake 在线拉取）

docs.title: 3.2 配置 CMake
docs.text:
cd d:\PracLab\replay-engine
.\configure.ps1

configure.ps1 会自动设置 MSVC 环境变量、清理旧缓存并用 Ninja 生成 Release 构建目录。脚本内硬编码了 MSVC 与 Windows SDK 路径，环境不同请按实际情况修改。

docs.title: 3.3 编译
docs.text:
.\build.ps1

成功时输出：

=== SUCCESS ===
DLL: d:\PracLab\replay-engine\out\build\x64-Release\package\addons\PracLabReplayEngine\bin\win64\PracLabReplayEngine.dll
Size: XXX.XX KB

docs.title: 3.4 关键构建约束
docs.text:
以下源于引擎行为与项目规范：

  • protoc 版本：为 3.21.x，CMakeLists.txt 会校验。
  • 静态运行时：Windows 使用 /MT（静态链接 CRT），保证插件可独立部署。
  • protoc 生成代码：.pb.h 中类的 final 关键字会被自动移除，以允许 PlayerCommand 继承 CSGOUserCmdPB。
  • gamedata.json：包含引擎函数签名，CS2 更新后可能需要重新扫描签名。详见 replay-engine/configs/addons/PracLabReplayEngine/gamedata.json。

docs.title: 4. 项目结构
docs.text:
PracLab/
├── PracLab.cs                # 插件主类（路由表/门控/配置加载/共享数据）
├── PracLab.csproj            # .NET 10 项目文件
├── Commands/                 # 各功能 partial 类
│   ├── BotCommands.cs            # .bot / .crouchbot / .kick / .kickall
│   ├── BotCollisionHandler.cs    # Bot 碰撞管理 + 重生传送
│   ├── ClearCommands.cs          # .clear / .break
│   ├── ConVarCommands.cs         # .solid / .impacts / .traj
│   ├── DamageHandler.cs          # 实时伤害提示
│   ├── DryRunCommands.cs         # .dryrun / .restartround
│   ├── EventHandlers.cs          # OnMapStart / OnEntitySpawned / EventPlayerBlind 等
│   ├── GrenadeCommands.cs        # .rethrow* / .last
│   ├── GrenadeFunctions.cs       # 投掷物生成辅助
│   ├── HelpCommand.cs            # .help
│   ├── PracticeCommands.cs       # .prac / .map
│   ├── ReplayCommands.cs         # .record / .replay / .clearrecord* / .currentrecord
│   ├── SpawnCommands.cs          # .spawn 系列 9 条
│   ├── SpawnMarkerCommands.cs    # .showspawns / .hidespawns + E 键传送
│   ├── TeamCommands.cs           # .watch / .fas
│   ├── TimeGodCommands.cs        # .fastforward / .noflash / .god
│   └── TimerCommand.cs           # .timer
├── cfg/PracLab/              # 服务器配置文件
│   ├── config.cfg                # 插件总开关 + 默认语言
│   ├── prac.cfg                  # 练习模式 ConVar
│   └── dryrun.cfg                # 竞技模式 ConVar
├── lang/                     # 本地化
│   ├── zh-CN.json
│   └── en.json
├── replay-engine/            # Layer 2 C++ Metamod 插件
│   ├── src/                      # 录制/回放/hook 实现
│   ├── include/praclab_replay.h  # 跨语言 ABI 头文件
│   ├── configs/                  # Metamod VDF + gamedata.json
│   ├── configure.ps1             # CMake 配置脚本
│   ├── build.ps1                 # 编译脚本
│   └── CMakeLists.txt
└── documentation/            # 本文档（MkDocs）
    ├── docs/
    └── mkdocs.yml

docs.title: 5. 跨语言 ABI 契约
docs.text:
Layer 1（C#）与 Layer 2（C++）之间通过 P/Invoke 调用 PRL_* 系列 C 函数通信。头文件位于 replay-engine/include/praclab_replay.h。

修改 ABI 时须同步更新两层代码：

修改类型 Layer 1（C#） Layer 2（C++） 新增/修改结构体字段 Commands/ReplayCommands.cs 中的 [StructLayout] 类 include/praclab_replay.h + src/exports.cpp 新增导出函数 Commands/ReplayCommands.cs 中的 [DllImport] 声明 include/praclab_replay.h 声明 + src/exports.cpp 实现 字段顺序调整 必须同步 必须同步（影响内存布局）

docs.title: 6. 本地化文件维护
docs.text:
所有面向玩家的文本必须从 lang/*.json 加载：

  • lang/zh-CN.json — 中文（默认语言）
  • lang/en.json — 英文

docs.title: 配置文件
docs.text: PracLab 的配置文件全部位于服务器的 <CS2>/csgo/cfg/PracLab/ 目录下，仓库 cfg/PracLab/ 提供默认模板。修改后需重启插件或服务器生效。

docs.title: 1. config.cfg — 插件总开关
docs.text:
路径：<CS2>/csgo/cfg/PracLab/config.cfg 格式：每行一个 ConVar，key value 用空格分隔，// 开头为注释。

ConVar 类型 默认值 说明 praclab_enabled bool true 插件总开关。false 时所有命令（含 .prac、.map、地图切换）均不响应，向发送者打印「practice 模式未启用」。 praclab_default_language string zh-CN 服务器默认语言代码。可选 zh-CN / en。

docs.title: 2. 录制文件目录
docs.text:
路径：<CS2>/csgo/cfg/PracLab/recordings/

.record 命令保存的 JSON 录制文件存放在此目录，文件名格式 <Id>_<PlayerName>.json。.clearrecord <Id> 与 .clearrecordall 会同步删除文件与内存条目。

自动创建：插件 Load 时调用 EnsureRecordingsDir() 确保目录存在，无需手动创建。

地图切换清空：OnMapStart 监听器会清空内存中的录制列表（_recordings.Clear()），但不删除 JSON 文件；如需保留跨地图录制，可在玩家切换地图前先用 .currentrecord 记录 Id。

docs.title: 3. 出生点方框地图配置
docs.text:
每张地图的方框 Z 偏移与序号 yaw 旋转角度硬编码在 Commands/SpawnMarkerCommands.cs 中：

  • SpawnTextYawByMap：每张地图每队序号文本的 yaw 旋转角度（度）
  • SpawnExtraZOffsetByMap：每张地图的方框/文本额外 Z 抬高量

当前配置：

地图 T yaw CT yaw 额外 Z 偏移 de_cache 90 180 0 de_train -90 0 0 de_anubis 0 180 0 de_vertigo 90 180 0 de_ancient 0 180 16 de_nuke -90 90 0 de_mirage 90 -90 0 de_inferno -90 90 0

未配置的地图默认 yaw=0、Z 偏移=0。新增地图支持时需在此表中补充配置并重新编译。
